title: Chief Communications Officer
summary: The Chief Communications Officer keeps Neuroartan’s public voice clear, calm, and consistent across every channel.
biography: This executive seat is open. Neuroartan has defined the role before appointing a public holder so the standard is clear from the beginning.
The role protects how the company speaks: in product language, public updates, founder communication, and institutional moments.
This profile remains role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Make Neuroartan understandable to the outside world with language that is clear, truthful, coordinated, and strong.
